summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VoucherVerse digital marketplace MVP. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend core flows working perfectly with minor admin login form validation issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin login form shows 'Email dan password harus diisi' error even when fields appear filled

passed_tests: Backend API health check and data seeding
All 18 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Product catalog with 8 products loading correctly
Homepage with dark theme and responsive layout
Search functionality and category filtering (Semua, Games, Voucher)
Product detail page with denomination selection (6 options)
Payment method selection (4 options: QRIS, BCA, BNI, Mandiri VA)
Complete order creation flow (guest and authenticated)
Payment success state with order confirmation
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin login form validation - form fields may not be properly binding values or form submission logic needs adjustment
